tools: Three musical instruments of your choice

features.name: Bardic Inspiration
features.description: Bonus action: give a creature a Bardic Inspiration die (d6) it can add to one d20 test, attack, or damage roll within the next hour. Uses equal to your Charisma modifier, regained on a long rest (a short rest from level 5).

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: You cast bard spells using Charisma, drawing on the bard spell list; you know cantrips and prepared spells that scale with level.

features.name: Cutting Words
features.description: Reaction: expend a Bardic Inspiration die to subtract it from a creature's attack roll, ability check, or damage roll.

featureChoices.name: Bonus Proficiencies
featureChoices.description: Gain proficiency in three skills of your choice.
